requirement_topic.en: EMC - IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-Series Evidence for Bhutan PV Inverters
requirement_topic.zh: EMC——不丹光伏逆变器IEC 62920和IEC 61000系列证据
requirement_topic.zht: EMC——不丹光伏逆變器IEC 62920和IEC 61000系列證據

summary.en: Bhutan Standards Bureau (BSB) is the national standards body, and Bhutan PV inverter projects should be checked for current BSB adoption or project-owner acceptance of IEC EMC standards. For grid-connected PV inverters, IEC 62920 is the dedicated EMC standard for photovoltaic power conversion equipment, and IEC 61000-series tests address emissions, immunity, harmonics, and power-quality compatibility. BEA, BPC, lenders, EPCs, or owners may require IEC EMC evidence as part of the grid-connection and technical submittal package.
summary.zh: 不丹标准局（BSB）是不丹国家标准机构，光伏逆变器项目应核查BSB现行采纳情况或项目业主对IEC EMC标准的接受情况。对于并网光伏逆变器，IEC 62920是光伏功率转换设备的专用EMC标准，IEC 61000系列测试覆盖发射、抗扰度、谐波和电能质量兼容性。BEA、BPC、贷款方、EPC或业主可能要求将IEC EMC证据纳入并网和技术提交资料包。
summary.zht: 不丹標準局（BSB）是不丹國家標準機構，光伏逆變器項目應核查BSB現行採納情況或項目業主對IEC EMC標準的接受情況。對於併網光伏逆變器，IEC 62920是光伏功率轉換設備的專用EMC標準，IEC 61000系列測試覆蓋發射、抗擾度、諧波和電能品質相容性。BEA、BPC、貸款方、EPC或業主可能要求將IEC EMC證據納入併網和技術提交資料包。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 - Photovoltaic power generating systems - EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61000 series - Electromagnetic compatibility test methods, limits, emissions, immunity, and harmonic current requirements
Bhutan Standards Bureau - national standards adoption and conformity-assessment context

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter EMC evidence is commonly generated under GB/T 37408-2021 and related domestic test methods at CNAS-accredited laboratories. While China domestic test work may use IEC 61000-family methods conceptually, a GB/T 37408 EMC certificate does not automatically prove compliance with IEC 62920 or with any BSB, BEA, BPC, lender, owner, or EPC requirement for Bhutan. Reports should also be checked for the supplied model, power rating, firmware configuration, and 230/400 V use case.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC证据通常依据GB/T 37408-2021及相关国内测试方法，由CNAS认可实验室出具。尽管中国国内测试在概念上可能使用IEC 61000系列方法，GB/T 37408 EMC证书并不会自动证明符合IEC 62920，也不会自动满足不丹BSB、BEA、BPC、贷款方、业主或EPC要求。还应核查报告是否覆盖所供应型号、功率等级、固件配置和230/400 V使用场景。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器EMC證據通常依據GB/T 37408-2021及相關國內測試方法，由CNAS認可實驗室出具。儘管中國國內測試在概念上可能使用IEC 61000系列方法，GB/T 37408 EMC證書並不會自動證明符合IEC 62920，也不會自動滿足不丹BSB、BEA、BPC、貸款方、業主或EPC要求。還應核查報告是否覆蓋所供應型號、功率等級、韌體配置和230/400 V使用場景。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 - 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters) - includes EMC-related requirements

gap.en: Gap: Chinese EMC certificates based solely on GB/T 37408-2021 are not automatically accepted as IEC 62920 or IEC 61000-series evidence for Bhutan projects. Exporters should prepare IEC 62920 EMC reports and applicable IEC 61000 harmonic, emission, and immunity evidence from an accredited laboratory, mapped to the exact inverter model and configuration. Where EMC or harmonic results depend on grid voltage or operating mode, confirm whether Bhutan's 230/400 V at 50 Hz conditions require additional evaluation.
gap.zh: 差距：仅依据GB/T 37408-2021的中国EMC证书不会自动作为不丹项目的IEC 62920或IEC 61000系列证据被接受。出口商应准备由认可实验室出具、映射至具体逆变器型号和配置的IEC 62920 EMC报告及适用IEC 61000谐波、发射和抗扰度证据。若EMC或谐波结果取决于电网电压或运行模式，应确认不丹230/400 V、50 Hz条件是否需要补充评估。
gap.zht: 差距：僅依據GB/T 37408-2021的中國EMC證書不會自動作為不丹項目的IEC 62920或IEC 61000系列證據被接受。出口商應準備由認可實驗室出具、映射至具體逆變器型號和配置的IEC 62920 EMC報告及適用IEC 61000諧波、發射和抗擾度證據。若EMC或諧波結果取決於電網電壓或運行模式，應確認不丹230/400 V、50 Hz條件是否需要補充評估。

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent; mandatory in practice where BSB-adopted standards, BEA/BPC review, lender requirements, owner specifications, or EPC procurement documents require IEC EMC evidence
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary or project-driven for China domestic certification; not a substitute for Bhutan project EMC acceptance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T 37408-2021 EMC evidence should not be treated as automatic IEC 62920 or IEC 61000 compliance for Bhutan. Prepare IEC EMC reports for the specific inverter model and confirm with BSB, BEA, BPC, the EPC, or the owner whether Bhutan's 230/400 V at 50 Hz operating conditions require supplementary testing.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应将中国GB/T 37408-2021 EMC证据视为自动满足不丹IEC 62920或IEC 61000合规。请为具体逆变器型号准备IEC EMC报告，并与BSB、BEA、BPC、EPC或业主确认不丹230/400 V 50 Hz运行条件是否需要补充测试。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應將中國GB/T 37408-2021 EMC證據視為自動滿足不丹IEC 62920或IEC 61000合規。請為具體逆變器型號準備IEC EMC報告，並與BSB、BEA、BPC、EPC或業主確認不丹230/400 V 50 Hz運行條件是否需要補充測試。
